[Congressional Bills 107th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 176 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                 In the House of Representatives, U.S.,

                                                         June 21, 2001.
    Resolved, That on the Committee on Resources, Mr. Hayworth of Arizona shall 
rank after Mr. Tancredo of Colorado.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
